# ProFix305

> ProFix305 is a commercial equipment repair company serving South Florida
> (Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties). It repairs commercial
> refrigeration, HVAC/AC, ice machines, kitchen equipment, mixers, and exhaust
> hoods for restaurants, hotels, grocers, and other food-service businesses.
> Available for 24/7 emergency dispatch and scheduled maintenance. Insured and
> background-checked technicians, same-day response in most cases.

Contact: (786) 919-7675 · profix305@gmail.com · https://www.profix305.com

## Services

- [Commercial Refrigeration Repair](https://www.profix305.com/miami/commercial-refrigeration-repair/): Walk-in coolers/freezers, reach-in units, display cases.
- [Commercial HVAC & AC Repair](https://www.profix305.com/miami/commercial-hvac-ac-repair/): Rooftop units, split systems, commercial air conditioning.
- [Commercial Ice Machine Repair](https://www.profix305.com/miami/commercial-ice-machine-repair/): All major ice machine brands and types.
- [Commercial Kitchen Equipment Repair](https://www.profix305.com/miami/commercial-kitchen-equipment-repair/): Ranges, ovens, fryers, dishwashers.
- [Commercial Mixer Repair](https://www.profix305.com/miami/commercial-mixer-repair/): Stand mixers and commercial food-prep mixers.
- [Commercial Exhaust Hood Repair](https://www.profix305.com/miami/commercial-exhaust-hood-repair/): Kitchen exhaust hoods and ventilation systems.

## Service Area

Miami-Dade County (Miami, Hialeah, Doral, Coral Gables, Kendall, Homestead),
Broward County (Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, Pompano Beach, Davie, Sunrise),
Palm Beach County (West Palm Beach, Boca Raton, Delray Beach, Boynton Beach,
Jupiter).

## Key facts

- Insured & background-checked technicians
- 24/7 emergency dispatch available
- Same-day response in most cases
- Book online: https://www.profix305.com/#booking
- Pricing guides: https://www.profix305.com/pricing/commercial-refrigeration-repair/ (and equivalent /pricing/<service>/ pages for each service above)
